category_sources: Official Hackage package page describes hOpenPGP-based command-line tools for OpenPGP-related operations.
source_facts.description says command-line tools for OpenPGP-related operations.
display_name_sources: Official Hackage package title is hopenpgp-tools.
docs_sources: Official Hackage page reports Haddock docs unavailable and lists the Salsa project as homepage/source; the source project page is the best official documentation surface found.
repo_sources: Official Hackage page lists home page https://salsa.debian.org/clint/hOpenPGP-tools and source repo git clone https://salsa.debian.org/clint/hopenpgp-tools.git.
tags_sources: Official Hackage page tags the package codec, data, program and lists executables hop, hkt, hokey, hot.
